issue: Problem with a purchase shown on your statement
consumer_complaint_narrative: I disputed a duplicate annual fee that showed up on my statement after I downgraded the card, but the bank still has not corrected the balance. I want the charge removed and the statement fixed.

My online banking access was locked after a verification prompt failed and I cannot sign back in to download transaction records. I need access restored and the account reviewed for suspicious login attempts.
The servicer keeps reporting the wrong payoff status and customer support keeps sending scripted answers. I need the record corrected and a clear explanation of what changed.
A money transfer keeps failing after the final review screen and the app only shows a generic error. I need someone to investigate the repeated failure because the payment is time sensitive.
